CREATE TABLE numbers (base FLOAT, exponent FLOAT);
SELECT base, exponent, power(base, exponent) AS result FROM numbers WHERE base > 0;
SELECT power(n.base, n.exponent) AS power_result, a.value FROM numbers n JOIN additional_numbers a ON n.base < a.value;
SELECT (SELECT power(base, exponent) FROM numbers WHERE base = 2) + (SELECT power(base, exponent) FROM numbers WHERE base = 3) AS combined_power;
SELECT (SELECT power(base, exponent) FROM numbers) + (SELECT value FROM additional_numbers) AS total_power;
